languages.original_text: "Count me out. Even the seats of this so-called vehicle look like they feed off the pain of the people who sit in them. I'd rather keep all my body parts intact."

languages.text: "Только без меня. У этого так называемого транспорта даже сиденья выглядят так, словно они подпитываются болью сидящих в них. Предпочитаю сохранить все части своего тела в целости".
languages.translation_comment: Found a Drukhar gondola in the Trazyn Museum

languages.text: "Count me out. Even the seats in this so-called vehicle look like they feed off the pain of the people who sit in them. I'd rather keep all my body parts intact."
languages.original_text: "Только без меня. У этого так называемого транспорта даже сиденья выглядят так, словно они подпитываются болью сидящих в них. Предпочитаю сохранить все части своего тела в целости".

traits.locale_text: "Count me out. Even the seats of this so-called vehicle look like they feed off the pain of the people who sit in them. I'd rather keep all my body parts intact."
"Count me out. Even the seats of this so-called vehicle look like they feed off the pain of the people who sit in them. I'd rather keep all my body parts intact."
"Count me out. Even the seats of this so-called vehicle look like they feed off the pain of the people who sit in them. I'd rather keep all my body parts intact."

languages.text: 「私は乗らない。このいわゆる車両の座席は、座る人の苦しみを糧にしているように見える。私は自分の身体の部位を全て完備したままいたい。」
languages.original_text: "Count me out. Even the seats of this so-called vehicle look like they feed off the pain of the people who sit in them. I'd rather keep all my body parts intact."

traits.locale_text: 「私は乗らない。このいわゆる車両の座席は、座る人の苦しみを糧にしているように見える。私は自分の身体の部位を全て完備したままいたい。」

languages.text: « Ce sera sans moi. Même les sièges de ce soi-disant véhicule ont l'air de se nourrir de la douleur de ceux qui s'y asseyent. Je préférerais que toutes les parties de mon corps restent intactes. »
languages.original_text: "Count me out. Even the seats in this so-called vehicle look like they feed off the pain of the people who sit in them. I'd rather keep all my body parts intact."

traits.locale_text: « Ce sera sans moi. Même les sièges de ce soi-disant véhicule ont l'air de se nourrir de la douleur de ceux qui s'y asseyent. Je préférerais que toutes les parties de mon corps restent intactes. »

languages.text: "Ich bin raus. Selbst die Sitze dieses sogenannten Fahrzeugs sehen aus, als würden sie vom Schmerz der Leute leben, die darauf Platz nehmen. Ich würde gerne alle meine Körperteile behalten."
languages.original_text: "Count me out. Even the seats in this so-called vehicle look like they feed off the pain of the people who sit in them. I'd rather keep all my body parts intact."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin raus. Selbst die Sitze dieses sogenannten Fahrzeugs sehen aus, als würden sie vom Schmerz der Leute leben, die darauf Platz nehmen. Ich würde gerne alle meine Körperteile behalten."

languages.text: "Beni saymayın. Bu sözde aracın koltukları bile oturanların acısından besleniyor gibi görünüyor. Vücut parçalarımın sağlam kalmasını tercih ederim."
languages.original_text: "Count me out. Even the seats in this so-called vehicle look like they feed off the pain of the people who sit in them. I'd rather keep all my body parts intact."

traits.locale_text: "Beni saymayın. Bu sözde aracın koltukları bile oturanların acısından besleniyor gibi görünüyor. Vücut parçalarımın sağlam kalmasını tercih ederim."

languages.text: «Conmigo no cuentes. Hasta los asientos de este supuesto vehículo tienen pinta de alimentarse del dolor de sus ocupantes. Prefiero no dejarme aquí ningún trozo de mi cuerpo».
languages.original_text: "Count me out. Even the seats in this so-called vehicle look like they feed off the pain of the people who sit in them. I'd rather keep all my body parts intact."

traits.locale_text: «Conmigo no cuentes. Hasta los asientos de este supuesto vehículo tienen pinta de alimentarse del dolor de sus ocupantes. Prefiero no dejarme aquí ningún trozo de mi cuerpo».

languages.text: “可别算上我。就连这所谓载具的座椅，看起来都像是要从乘坐者身上榨取痛苦似的。我宁愿让我身体的每个部分都保持原样。”
languages.original_text: "Count me out. Even the seats in this so-called vehicle look like they feed off the pain of the people who sit in them. I'd rather keep all my body parts intact."

traits.locale_text: “可别算上我。就连这所谓载具的座椅，看起来都像是要从乘坐者身上榨取痛苦似的。我宁愿让我身体的每个部分都保持原样。”
